# CI/CD

## Attributes

Attributes defined in the `cicd` namespace. Application developers are encouraged to reuse existing attributes; see these [naming recommendations](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/naming/#recommendations-for-application-developers) regarding attribute selection and naming for custom use cases.
